center.name: Dos Marmelos River
center.summary: Dos Marmelos River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ferruginous-backed antbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: elutus is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers and south to the Roosevelt and upper Dos Marmelos rivers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: elutus is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers and south to the Roosevelt and upper Dos Marmelos rivers
